description: Elementary aspects of Lagrange theory of fields and field quantization; Bose, Fermi and Pauli operators; interaction of fields; quantum theory of damping and fluctuations; applications to lasers, nonlinear optics, and quantum optics. Knowledge of lasers [such asPHYSICS/​E C E  546] and graduate-level electromagnetics [such asE C E 740orPHYSICS 721] strongly encouraged.
